name: subagent-router
description: A lightweight Codex skill that keeps the main session small by routing suitable work to subagents.

interface.longDescription: Subagent Router adds a concise workflow for deciding when to delegate search, implementation, testing, and review work to isolated subagents while keeping the main session focused on coordination and final decisions.
defaultPrompt: Use Subagent Router while working on this task.
Use Subagent Router and keep the main session concise.
